title: Show HN: Oku – One tab to filter out noise from feeds and content sources
full_text:
Can I use Oku for free?

Yes. Free includes 1 board, up to 6 total panels, and daily digests. Paid plans add higher limits, all panel types, weekly digests, and Smart summaries (including Reddit and YouTube summaries on Pro).What can I add to a board?

Reddit, Hacker News, Product Hunt, RSS, Top Stories, YouTube, Podcasts, Polymarket, Crypto, Stocks, and more. See all supported panel types.How do digests work?

Oku compiles top items from your panels into one clean digest. Free supports daily digests; Start and Pro support daily and weekly digests.What’s the difference between Start and Pro?

Start gives you 3 boards, up to 30 total panels, all panel types, and article summaries. Pro gives you unlimited boards and panels, plus Reddit and YouTube summaries and early feature access.Can Oku summarize content for me?

Yes. Start and Pro include article summaries. Pro also includes Reddit thread summaries and YouTube transcript summaries.Can I save things to read later?

Yes. You can save cards from any panel, then open them later from Saved. In Reader mode you can also highlight passages and add notes.How does the newsletter inbox work?

On Start and Pro, you get a dedicated inbox address. Forward or subscribe newsletters to that address and read them directly inside Oku.What is Website Watch?

Website Watch lets you monitor key pages as visual snapshots inside your board, so you can check important updates at a glance.Are my boards public?

Boards are private to your account by default.Can I cancel anytime?

Yes. You can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel from your billing portal at any time.
